message:
refactor: centralize REPO_OWNER/REPO_NAME/BIN_NAME as crate-level constants

Promote repository identity constants from local definitions in
upgrade.rs to crate-level pub const in lib.rs:
- REPO_OWNER ("Dicklesworthstone"), REPO_NAME ("beads_rust"), BIN_NAME ("br")

Update consumers:
- upgrade.rs: import from crate::, use interpolation in manual-upgrade URL
- version.rs: construct GitHub API URL from constants
- agents.rs: convert AGENT_BLURB from const to LazyLock<String> that
  interpolates REPO_OWNER/REPO_NAME into the blurb URL. Add agent_blurb()
  accessor, update all call sites including ~10 tests.

Add unit test: repository_identity_constants_match_expected_values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
